title: LLM-Based Autograding Framework
description: A code generation-based autograding question framework that leverages large language models to automatically generate and evaluate programming assessments.

title: AI-Enhanced Classroom Tools
description: Developing LLM applications that foster personalized learning environments and reimagine the role of teachers in AI-enhanced classrooms.

title: Interactive Database Learning System
description: An AI-assisted system to support students' learning and assessment in introductory database concepts, focusing on effective scaffolding and feedback.

title: Translanguaging in CS Education
description: Research into how non-native novice programmers can overcome language barriers when learning to code, exploring semiotic and linguistic resources.
